name: Asus Tuf Gaming B850M-Plus
highlights: Asus TUF GAMING B850M-PLUS is a robust micro-ATX motherboard designed for gamers and PC builders using AMD Ryzen™ 9000, 8000, and 7000 series processors
Powered by the AMD B850 chipset, it supports high-speed DDR5 memory up to 8000+ MT/s, PCIe 5
